subject: fix(dashboard): 6 fixes from cross-tab audit
body:
- Fix Projects commit counts to use filteredCommits (was using unfiltered)
- Fix Timeline trend charts to use getUTCMonthKey (was .substring(0,7))
- Add pb-12 bottom padding to content wrapper
- Add <hr> separators between stacked sections in Timeline and Breakdown tabs
- Show loading spinner for Discover file insights during Phase 1
- Use ?? instead of || for Health summary breakdown fallbacks

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RbDmv8obRPnToLezqSGmHg
title: 6 fixes from cross-tab audit
